summary: Full e2e testing of hyperlocal commerce MVP. Backend GET /api/catalog and frontend flows (landing → categories → products → cart → checkout → confirmation) all working. WhatsApp deep link generated correctly with emoji-grouped sections, total, address, notes; cart cleared on order placement; localStorage 'lc_cart_v1' persisted correctly. Liquor ₹1000 minimum rule, cigarettes Full Pack Only badge/notice, sticky cart bar hide-rules, and form validations (name/phone/address) all verified.
action_items: Minor: Checkout.jsx calls navigate('/cart') inside render when items.length===0 — React warning 'Cannot update a component (BrowserRouter) while rendering a different component (Checkout)'. Move into useEffect to avoid setState-in-render anti-pattern.
critical_code_review_comments: Checkout.jsx (line 34-37): `if (items.length === 0) { navigate('/cart', { replace: true }); return null; }` triggers React warning for setState during render. Wrap in useEffect.

Confirmation.jsx orderId is generated on every render via useMemo with no deps but Math.random — safe due to []-like memo on mount, however the value will change on remount/refresh. Consider persisting ref id alongside lc_last_order so 'Re-open WhatsApp' / refresh shows the same Ref ID.
apiClient.js fetchCatalog has no error handling; Categories.jsx handles error but Products.jsx silently fails (no .catch) — if /api/catalog fails on Products page, skeleton stays forever.
Several Unsplash image URLs in catalog may 404 (e.g., placeholder ids) — UI has no broken-image fallback. Consider adding onError handler in ProductCard/CategoryCard.
seed_data_creation: N/A — backend serves static mock catalog
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest covers GET /api/catalog (4 categories, liquor min_order=1000, cigarettes full_pack_only=true with 'Full Pack Only' product tags, product schema). Frontend Playwright covered: landing CTA, 4 category cards, liquor subgroup chips (beer/whisky/vodka/rum/gin), ADD→stepper swap, cigarettes notice/badge, liquor min ₹1000 rule with disabled checkout + 'Add more to checkout' text, sticky cart bar visible on store/products & hidden on /cart /checkout /confirmation, FREE delivery in bill summary, checkout validations (empty name, invalid phone), valid order builds correct wa.me URL (https://wa.me/919999999999?text=...) with 🛒 New Order, customer name, phone, 🍻 Liquor section, Total, Flat address, Notes, Cash on Delivery; navigates to /confirmation, cart cleared (lc_cart_v1=[]), Ref · LCxxxxxx visible, Re-open WhatsApp + Back to store + Copy summary buttons all work. Use viewport 420x820. Override window.open via init script to capture wa.me URL.
